client_id.description: Plaid client_id. Sent in the JSON body of every request (Plaid's own convention, never a header); never logged.

secret.description: Plaid secret. Sent in the JSON body of every request; never logged.

base_url.description: Plaid API base URL override (e.g. https://sandbox.plaid.com or https://development.plaid.com for non-production environments).

country_codes.description: Comma-separated ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country codes for the institutions.get request body (e.g. US,CA).

page_size.description: Records per page (1-500), sent as the institutions.get request body's count field.

max_pages.description: Hard cap on pages read per sync; 0, "all", or "unlimited" means unbounded.

mode.description: Set to "fixture" to emit deterministic canned records with no network access (test/conformance-harness affordance only, never set in production).
